raw: This pass provides half-priced admission for up to 4 individuals including children; children under 12 months are admitted free. Please visit the museum website before planning your visit for the most up-to-date information about hours and schedule. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher code on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email. Please contact the library with any questions. Please note that reserving a library pass does not guarantee that space will be available at the museum on your preferred date.
